title: Arkangel AI - Marketing Strategy Exploration
summary: Initial exploratory meeting with Arkangel AI CEO Laura Velasquez to discuss structuring a scalable educational marketing program. The company operates in the health sector, transforming unstructured data into health insights, targeting pharmaceuticals in LATAM and hospitals in the USA. Currently generating $14K/month in B2C revenue with 300-500 daily users through their KOL (Key Opinion Leader) program. An in-person follow-up meeting was scheduled for February 7th to advance the automated marketing strategy.

discussion_points.description: Two primary markets identified: LATAM (pharmaceuticals, access leaders) and USA (hospitals, Revenue Cycle Managers, Medical Coders). The product transforms unstructured data into actionable health insights.
Annual B2B licensing model with a B2C-to-B2B flywheel strategy. Current B2C revenue stands at $14K/month with an approximately 6-month sales cycle for B2B deals.
The existing KOL influencer program generates 300-500 new users per day. This program needs to be expanded and optimized as part of the marketing strategy.
Need to develop an automated educational marketing system targeting their ICPs across multiple channels (LinkedIn, Reddit, X). Investment split: 60-70% conversion, 30-40% brand.
Discussion about optimizing positioning across LinkedIn, Reddit, and X to reach target audiences effectively. Time-to-value metrics need to be implemented.

action_items.description: Develop automated marketing strategy for educational content targeting ICPs in health sector
Plan and structure influencer (KOL) program expansion
Optimize channel positioning strategy across LinkedIn, Reddit, and X
Implement time-to-value metrics for marketing campaigns
Attend in-person meeting at La 93 to discuss marketing strategy

decisions: Proceed with exploration of a scalable automated marketing program for Arkangel AI
Schedule in-person follow-up meeting for Friday February 7th at 11:00am at La 93
next_steps: In-person meeting on Friday February 7th at 11:00am at La 93 to discuss automated marketing strategy and influencer program
Develop initial marketing automation proposal targeting pharmaceutical companies in LATAM and hospitals in USA
Define KOL program structure and expansion plan
